items.docs: Test connectivity to the REST API. Returns an empty object on success.
Test connectivity to the REST API and get the current server time as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: symbols
params.description: JSON array of trading pair symbols to query. Cannot be used with the symbol parameter.

params.name: permissions
params.description: Filter by account permissions such as SPOT or MARGIN.

items.docs: Get current exchange trading rules and symbol information, including available trading pairs, price filters, lot size filters, and order type constraints.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of price levels to return. Default 100. Valid limits are 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 500, 1000, 5000.

items.docs: Get the current order book depth for a given trading pair. Returns bids and asks with price and quantity at each level.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of trades to return. Default 500, max 1000.

items.docs: Get recent trades for a given symbol. Returns the most recent trades up to the specified limit.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of trades to return. Default 500, max 1000.

params.name: fromId
params.description: Trade ID to fetch from. Default gets most recent trades.

items.docs: Get older trades for a given symbol. Requires API key authentication but does not require a signature.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: fromId
params.description: ID to get aggregate trades from (inclusive).

params.name: startTime
params.description: Start time in milliseconds (inclusive).

params.name: endTime
params.description: End time in milliseconds (inclusive).

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results to return. Default 500, max 1000.

items.docs: Get compressed, aggregate trades. Trades that fill at the same time, from the same order, with the same price will have the quantity aggregated.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: interval
params.description: Kline/candlestick interval.

params.name: startTime
params.description: Start time in milliseconds.

params.name: endTime
params.description: End time in milliseconds.

params.name: timeZone
params.description: Timezone for kline open/close times. Default is UTC.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results to return. Default 500, max 1000.

items.docs: Get kline/candlestick bars for a symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: interval
params.description: Kline/candlestick interval.

params.name: startTime
params.description: Start time in milliseconds.

params.name: endTime
params.description: End time in milliseconds.

params.name: timeZone
params.description: Timezone for kline open/close times. Default is UTC.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results to return. Default 500, max 1000.

items.docs: Get kline/candlestick bars optimized for presentation of candlestick charts. Returns modified kline data.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

items.docs: Get the current average price for a symbol over the last 5 minutes.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: symbols
params.description: JSON array of symbols to query.

params.name: type
params.description: Supported values are FULL or MINI. MINI omits some fields.

items.docs: Get 24-hour rolling window price change statistics for a symbol or all symbols. Careful when accessing this with no symbol as the weight is very high.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: symbols
params.description: JSON array of symbols to query.

items.docs: Get the latest price for a symbol or symbols.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: symbols
params.description: JSON array of symbols to query.

items.docs: Get the best price and quantity on the order book for a symbol or symbols.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: symbols
params.description: JSON array of symbols to query.

params.name: windowSize
params.description: Window size for the rolling statistics. Defaults to 1d. Supported values include 1m, 2m, ... 59m, 1h, 2h, ... 23h, 1d, 2d, ... 7d.

params.name: type
params.description: Response type. FULL or MINI.

items.docs: Get rolling window price change statistics with a configurable window size. Unlike the 24hr ticker, this allows specifying the statistics window.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The order ID to query.

params.name: origClientOrderId
params.description: The client order ID to query.

params.name: recvWindow
params.description: The number of milliseconds after timestamp the request is valid for. Default 5000, max 60000.

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Request timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

params.name: signature
params.description: HMAC SHA256 signature of the total query string using the API secret key.

items.docs: Check an order's status. Either orderId or origClientOrderId must be sent.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Trading pair symbol, e.g. BTCUSDT.

params.name: side
params.description: Order side.

params.name: type
params.description: Order type.

params.name: timeInForce
params.description: Time in force policy for the order.

params.name: quantity
params.description: Order quantity in base asset.

params.name: quoteOrderQty
params.description: Order quantity in quote asset. Used for MARKET orders.

params.name: price
params.description: Order price. Required for LIMIT orders.

params.name: newClientOrderId
params.description: A unique ID for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.

params.name: strategyId
params.description: Arbitrary numeric value identifying the strategy.

params.name: strategyType
params.description: Arbitrary numeric value identifying the strategy type. Values smaller than 1000000 are reserved.

params.name: stopPrice
params.description: Used with STOP_LOSS, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, TAKE_PROFIT, and TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT orders.

params.name: trailingDelta
params.description: Used with STOP_LOSS, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, TAKE_PROFIT, and TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT orders. Basis points.

params.name: icebergQty
params.description: Used with LIMIT, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, and TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT to create an iceberg order.

params.name: newOrderRespType
params.description: Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL.

params.name: selfTradePreventionMode
params.description: The self-trade prevention mode.

params.name: recvWindow
params.description: The number of milliseconds after timestamp the request is valid for. Default 5000, max 60000.

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Request timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

params.name: signature
params.description: HMAC SHA256 signature of the total query string using the API secret key.

items.docs: Send in a new order. Requires SIGNED authentication with the TRADE permission. Order types include LIMIT, MARKET, STOP_LOSS, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, TAKE_PROFIT, TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT, and LIMIT_MAKER.

params.name: newClientOrderId
params.description: Used to uniquely identify this cancel request.

params.name: cancelRestrictions
params.description: Supported values ONLY_NEW and ONLY_PARTIALLY_FILLED.

params.name: recvWindow
params.description: The number of milliseconds after timestamp the request is valid for. Default 5000, max 60000.

params.name: timestamp
params.description: Request timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

params.description: HMAC SHA256 signature of the total query string using the API secret key.

items.docs: Displays the list of orders that were expired because of STP (Self Trade Prevention).

Start a new user data stream. The stream is closed after 60 minutes unless a keepalive is sent. If the account has an active listenKey, that listenKey will be returned and its validity extended for 60 minutes.

params.name: listenKey
params.description: The listen key to keep alive.

items.docs: Keepalive a user data stream to prevent a timeout. User data streams will close after 60 minutes. It is recommended to send a ping about every 30 minutes.

params.name: listenKey
params.description: The listen key to close.

items.docs: Close out a user data stream.
